global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with abstract shapes and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Encourages users to explore trending content and shop.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Main graphic element
elements.description: An abstract shape composed of overlapping circles and rectangles in varying sizes, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Trending text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Watch what's trending' is prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Subtext
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main text reads 'Start free today,' providing additional context.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Shop now' in white, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A smaller abstract shape, possibly a circle, positioned to the left of the main graphic.

elements.label: Additional graphic element
elements.description: Another abstract shape, similar in style to the main graphic, located towards the bottom center.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: A smaller decorative shape, possibly an oval, positioned near the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Additional graphic element
elements.description: A rectangle shape located towards the bottom center, complementing the main graphic.

elements.label: Small graphic element
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Small graphic element
elements.description: Another small circular shape positioned slightly above the previous element.

elements.label: Main call to action
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Shop now' in bold white letters.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'PulsePlay' is displayed in a small font at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the text 'SALE' in bold, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' located at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern and colorful, trending text and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, with the main subject graphic behind it, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Watch what's trending, Start free today, Shop now, PulsePlay, SALE, UGC
